options.text: The two events A and B are independent and P(A | B) = 0.3 and P(B | A) = 0.5, respectively.
P(A^c | B) = 0.9, where A^c is the complement of the event A
P(A | B^c) = P(A | B), where A^c and B^c are the complements of the events A and B respectively

reason: Option A was truncated at 'P(A |' and option B incorrectly contained the remainder of option A's text merged with its own text; the parser was confused by the '|' character inside option A's text
